calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-10-2008 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-16-2008 Continued To Jun-10-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-04-2008 Continued To May-16-08 At 08:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Gates for Suzanne Egan Dole (Petitioner). Seth Skootsky for James Danhakl (Respondent).

Mr. Gates reported that they had attended mediation and that it was somewhat productive. In addition, he stated that the mediation only dealt with the house, and that a hearing was needed to address the accounting and surcharge issues. Mr. Skootsky stated that he was surrprised at Mr. Gates request, that another round of mediation was to take place, and that his client may waive the accounting. The matter was continued to May 16, 2008.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

May 16, 2008. At the request of Counsel (Robert Gates), the matter was taken off the Evidentiary hearing calendar and continued to June 10, 2008 to be heard on the regular probate calendar. Counsel is to notice all parties.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-08-2008 Continued To Mar-04-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Gates for Petitioner. Seth Skootsky for James Danharel (Objector).

Mr. Gates informed the Court that a stipulation was on file and requested that the Court order the matter to mediation. The Court referred the matter to Pro Bono Mediation, (signing the order for the same). Mediation must be completed no later than February 26, 2008. The matter is set for status on March 04, 2008.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR# 11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Rob Harris.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-11-2007 Continued To Jan-08-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-20-2007 Continued To Dec-11-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-15-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance made.

The Executor has failed to comply with the August 06, 2007 court order. Order to show cause will be issued to the executor. Return date is November 26, 2007.

Judge: Herbert Donaldson. Reporter: Patrick Heard CSR#11055. Bailiff: A. Aguerre. Clerk: Rosie Noguera.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of Inventory
Off Calendar Sep-10-2007 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Jul-09-2007 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Robert Gates appearing for and with petitioner. Seth Skootsky appearing for respondent. Court 's tentative ruling is Petition will be denied. Court has no jurisdiction over the Trust. If property is in the Trust, Counsel will need file a separate trust proceeding. Nothing has been done in this estate. Court is setting a status date for filing of inventory and for final distribution. Inventory to be filed by 9/10. Petition for final distribution to be filed by 10/15. This petition is denied without prejudice to a Trust proceeding. Mr. Skootsky will prepare the order.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: R. Drocco.

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Jun-18-2007 Continued To Jul-09-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-04-2002 Granted Per Written Order
